# MarkBloom

> Free, open-source Markdown to PDF converter with live preview.

MarkBloom is a browser-based tool that converts Markdown into beautifully styled PDF documents. It features a real-time editor with syntax highlighting, a live preview panel, and one-click PDF export in A4, Letter, and Legal page sizes.

## Key Features

- Live Markdown editor with syntax highlighting (CodeMirror)
- Real-time preview with Tailwind Typography styling
- PDF export in A4, Letter, and Legal page sizes
- GitHub Flavored Markdown support (tables, task lists, strikethrough)
- Syntax-highlighted code blocks via Shiki
- Runs entirely in the browser — no server-side processing
- Free and open source (MIT license)

## Use Cases

- Converting technical documentation to PDF
- Creating styled reports from Markdown
- Exporting meeting notes and project docs as PDF
- Generating printable documents from Markdown files

## Tech Stack

- Next.js (React framework)
- CodeMirror (editor)
- React Markdown + Remark GFM (Markdown parsing)
- Shiki (syntax highlighting)
- Tailwind CSS + Typography plugin (styling)
- html2canvas + jsPDF (PDF generation)

## Links

- App: https://mertguvencli.github.io/markbloom
- Source: https://github.com/mertguvencli/markbloom
